Video.summary: Robert shares the chain of events that inspired him to devote his life to volunteerism and how this can bring deeper meaning to your life and soul too.
Video.title: How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy

Image.alt: How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy
How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy
How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy

Video.summary: The rise of guru Bhagwan and his model commune in Poona and oregon in the 1970s & 1980s told by his former close disciples, his personal secretary and bodyguard. A spiritual journey to the depths and shallows of the human soul.
Video.title: GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD

Image.alt: GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD
GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD

Video.summary: Arielle discusses her book “Turn Your Mate Into Your SoulMate” and shares why everyone needs to read this if they want a deep fulfilling relationship.
Video.title: How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford

Image.alt: How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford
How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford
How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford

Video.summary: The losers are revealed and one member from each team faces their greatest fear of heights.
Video.title: New Zealand Part 2

Image.alt: New Zealand Part 2
New Zealand Part 2
New Zealand Part 2

Video.summary: Giants go through professional speakers training in order to uplevel their skill prior to taking the stage at the International Technical University of Auckland for INSPIRE Mic
Video.title: New Zealand Part 3

Image.alt: New Zealand Part 3
New Zealand Part 3
New Zealand Part 3

Video.summary: Giants prepare to face the tallest waterfall to commercially raft in the entire world.
Video.title: New Zealand Part 4

Image.alt: New Zealand Part 4
New Zealand Part 4
New Zealand Part 4

Video.summary: Emptiness and Power in the Gap. The stunning Tungnath Peak at 13,000 ft, the Feminine Temple above the Masculine. Ken goes from rational doubter to having an experience beyond understanding that relates to his deceased sister. Unfortunately, the experience is tainted by ignorance and the seemingly inspiring day is further marred when Anna has an accident…
Video.title: Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath

Image.alt: Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath
Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath
Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath

Video.summary: Badrinath – Reverberating with thousands of years of yogic wisdom… But Jeff won’t even wear a helmet. You try and talk to him, he won’t listen to me, says Jen. The ebb and flow of relationships and how to sustain them is found here in Badrinath, the temple of Naryana, the sustainer. This isn’t religious, it is all about getting empty and receiving the wisdom of the sages in the great Himalayas.
Video.title: Real Love at Badrinath

Image.alt: Real Love at Badrinath
Real Love at Badrinath
Real Love at Badrinath

Video.summary: Before Riding to the Hidden Valley of the Flowers, we get a rare view of the hidden life of the riders in this real world of yogis opening scene. This lightness contrasts a big incedent at the the following morning, setting the riders and Ryan up for some harsh truths about Power and passivity. True Power is yours to embrace. This is not a journey to feel better.
Video.title: True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers

Image.alt: True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers
True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers
True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers

Video.summary: A rare in off the cuff dialogue with Anand at breakfast about his father and the true meaning of abundance, wealth, sex, power, fame… Then an epic hike up to 15,000 feet and a temple dedicated to service and unity at Hemkund Sahib and its glacial lake. Here, Tiffany and Elle are served great reminders of the teacher within.
Video.title: Unity at Hemkund Sahib

Image.alt: Unity at Hemkund Sahib
Unity at Hemkund Sahib
Unity at Hemkund Sahib

Video.summary: The longest moto ride of the trip awaits, after a grueling 20 day journey and coming down from Hemkund Sahib, we ride to Rishikesh, where the journey began. But nightfall might set in and cause troubles and challenges. As we know, challenges reveal who we are and the Ganga River serves up a challenge for our narrator Adam, as he learns a deep lesson foretold in episode one. Is the Ganga a mother?
Video.title: A Treacherous Ride Home

Image.alt: A Treacherous Ride Home
A Treacherous Ride Home
A Treacherous Ride Home

Video.summary: We finish at the Sacred Ganga River, where we began. The riders reflect on their journey and the idea of freedom has set in fully. It is our responsibility for choosing how we see the world. To embrace this power, It takes courage, discipline and strength. Something as Sacred as Freedom demands our totality. Thankfully, we are greater than we can imagine.
Video.title: We are Greater than we know.

Image.alt: We are Greater than we know.
We are Greater than we know.
We are Greater than we know.

Video.summary: Addiction is neither a choice you make or an unavoidable disease. It’s an attempt to solve a problem. The conundrum is… it almost works.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction
A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction
A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction

Video.summary: Expressions of healthy anger are different from unhealthy anger. Dr. Maté articulates the difference and discusses the increased health risks when healthy anger is repressed.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?
A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?
A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?

Video.summary: What is the meaning of health? In this lesson, you’ll learn what health looks like and how to approach healing with compassionate inquiry and healthy disillusionment.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?
A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?
A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?

Video.summary: The birth control pill changed history—but how does it really work? This episode explores how the pill suppresses ovulation, alters hormone rhythms, and impacts mood, libido, vaginal health, PCOS, and cancer risk. Learn progestin vs. progesterone, what to expect coming off, and how to discuss informed consent.
Video.title: Episode 5: The Pill Paradox

Image.alt: Episode 5: The Pill Paradox
Episode 5: The Pill Paradox
Episode 5: The Pill Paradox

Video.summary: Stress can shut down libido by spiking cortisol and pushing your body into survival mode. This episode explains the HPA axis, how chronic stress disrupts sleep, mood, and metabolism, and why desire often reflects nervous system safety. Learn simple resets—breathwork, walking, co-regulation, and better sleep.
Video.title: The Luminescence Podcast with Schuyler GrantEpisode 6: Stress, Survival, and Sex

Image.alt: The Luminescence Podcast with Schuyler GrantEpisode 6: Stress, Survival, and Sex
The Luminescence Podcast with Schuyler GrantEpisode 6: Stress, Survival, and Sex
The Luminescence Podcast with Schuyler GrantEpisode 6: Stress, Survival, and Sex

Video.summary: Testosterone isn’t just for men—it fuels women’s energy, muscle, mood, brain function, and libido. This episode unpacks why levels decline, signs of low T, testing basics, and HRT options (creams, gels, injections, pellets), plus risks, benefits, and natural ways to support healthy hormones.
Video.title: Episode 7: The Biggest Myth in Women's Health

Image.alt: Episode 7: The Biggest Myth in Women's Health
Episode 7: The Biggest Myth in Women's Health
Episode 7: The Biggest Myth in Women's Health

Video.summary: Intimacy isn’t just penetration or orgasm. This episode redefines pleasure through connection, consent, kink wisdom, and communication. Explore novelty, neurodivergent desire, self-pleasure, and how chronic pain or disability can reshape—without ending—intimacy. It’s sex on your terms, not the movie script.
Video.title: Episode 8: Not the Sex You See in the Movies

Image.alt: Episode 8: Not the Sex You See in the Movies
Episode 8: Not the Sex You See in the Movies
Episode 8: Not the Sex You See in the Movies

Video.summary: Over 800 Fights in her Life Professional MMA Fighter Julia Dorny, What get in Martial Arts when you train in over 6 Arts, you get the professional MMA Fighter in Julia Dorny! She is humble and amazing and is training for her upcoming fights. She is a podcaster with her show Women Hit Harder! Get ready and get involved in the conversation!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny

Video.summary: From Hell to Heaven's Doors, From Crime to having Quality Time Author Denise Jones! We are about to get deep in conversation with a young lady that came from the Chicago Crime , drugs and Jail to coming out to finding the light of success and glory! This will take you through the pain and passion of what she and her mom went through, turn your speakers up and get inspired!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones

Video.title: Smart Life S1E30

Smart Life S1E30
Smart Life S1E30

Smart Life S1E31

Smart Life S1E32
Smart Life S1E32

Smart Life S1E33

Video.summary: Ovarian Cancer with Dr. Ellen Schwartzbard, Improve Your Sleep with Janette Janero, Physical Therapy for Knee Osteoarthritis with Ron Yacoub

Image.alt: Smart Life S1E35
Smart Life S1E35
Smart Life S1E35

Video.summary: Founder, Glenn Marsden, of Imperfectly Perfect Campaign, and Jeremy Jackson, former Baywatch star share their personal journeys with body dysmorphia and how it led to a worldwide campaign. A young man faces his fears and a tale of kindness at 30,000 ft.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect
Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect
Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect

Video.summary: Laura Di Franco, CEO of Brave Healer Productions, discusses brave healing and the power of sharing our stories. And, meet Oyen the ginger cat and adorable kids from India, along with Daaji redefining meditation for a joyful heart.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing

Video.summary: Join The Kitchen Psychic, Hannah McKitrick, as we talk ditching diets, embracing food freedom, and finding lightness in mind and body, alongside Susan Noles from The Golden Bachelor for some fun, and meditation leader Daaji discussing compassion.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
